name: copilotcli-monitor
description: A macOS menu bar plugin that shows real-time status of your [GitHub Copilot CLI](https://docs.github.com/en/copilot/github-copilot-in-the-cli) sessions. Built for [SwiftBar](https://github.com/swiftbar/SwiftBar) (also compatible with [xbar](https://xbarapp.com)).

scripts.lint: npm run lint:ts && npm run lint:shell
